seo.title: Car Rental Terms
seo.description: Check the rental terms for working with Bolt and Uber in Rzeszów. Clear rules and no hidden fees.
seo.serviceName: Car Rental for Bolt and Uber Drivers

intro.description: Rental terms for Bolt and Uber drivers — transparent, secure, and without unnecessary formalities.

items.title: Vehicle
points: Maintenance and insurance covered by us

commissionTable.title: Weekly Revenue
commissionTable.subtitle: Commission
commissionTable.note: Commission is calculated automatically each week

items.title: Costs and Payments
content: Settlement commission – even 0 PLN depending on revenue
Mandate contract tax – 50 PLN per week (for students under 26 – 0 PLN)

items.title: 50% VAT Refund on Fuel
content: We refund 50% of the VAT included in fuel expenses
Settlement is processed automatically — no additional formalities

items.title: Vehicle, Maintenance and Insurance
items.intro: We provide a vehicle fully prepared for taxi work.
content: Full technical maintenance covered by us
Replacement vehicle during repairs or inspections
All vehicles equipped with dashcams including interior recording

items.title: Work with Bolt / Uber
items.intro: We provide full formal support when starting cooperation.
